event: Parisian evening street scene near Comedie Francaise
description: A Parisian evening scene showing a wet, reflective street with pedestrians, horse-drawn carriages, and illuminated buildings. A stone fountain is visible at left. Gas lamps and warm light from shop windows create golden reflections on the rain-slicked pavement. Bare autumn trees frame the scene. Classical buildings with ornate facades line the square. Figures in period attire walk through the damp evening. The palette is warm amber, purple, and deep blue, creating a nostalgic atmospheric quality.

_meta.title: The theater of the Comedie Francaise
